description: Generate a well-formatted PDF of the complete Uzbek translation. The PDF should have a professional appearance with proper formatting including: title page, table of contents, chapter headers, consistent fonts that support Uzbek characters, proper margins, and page numbers. Save as 'Shaxmat - bolalar o'yini (O'zbek tilida tarjima).pdf' in the repository root.
steps: Create a Python script at /projects/sandbox/gg/generate_pdf.py using fpdf2 library
Download and configure a Unicode font that supports Uzbek Latin characters (DejaVu Sans or similar) - fpdf2 supports TTF fonts with Unicode
Design the PDF layout: Title page with book title 'Shaxmat - Bolalar O'yini', subtitle 'O'qitish texnikalari', authors' names translated, A4 page size, 2cm margins
Add table of contents (Mundarija) with chapter names in Uzbek and page numbers
Process each chapter file from chapters_uz/, adding proper chapter headers, body text with word wrapping, and section formatting (Coffee Talk/Coach's Corner boxes or indentation)
Add page numbers to each page (footer)
Add diagram placeholders where diagrams are referenced (e.g., '[Diagramma X.Y]')
Generate the final PDF at /projects/sandbox/gg/Shaxmat - bolalar o'yini (O'zbek tilida tarjima).pdf
Verify the PDF opens correctly and all Uzbek characters render properly
acceptance_criteria: PDF file is generated successfully at the specified path
All Uzbek characters render correctly (including o', g', sh, ch special characters)
PDF contains all chapters in correct order
PDF has title page, table of contents, and page numbers
PDF file is reasonable size (not corrupted)
verification: Run generate_pdf.py and confirm it produces the PDF without errors
Verify PDF file exists and has reasonable size (should be at least 500KB for a full book)
Use pdfplumber to open the generated PDF and verify page count and text extraction
